description_long: A large, bone-in steak is sliced into thick, juicy pieces and arranged in a circular pattern on a white ceramic plate. The steak features a prominent bone, likely from a T-bone or porterhouse cut, with a well-seared, dark brown crust on the exterior. The interior of the steak is a vibrant pinkish-red, indicating a medium rare doneness, with visible marbling of fat throughout the meat. The slices are thick and substantial, with some charred edges and a glistening, moist surface. No visible garnishes, sauces, or decorative elements accompany the steak; the focus is entirely on the meat itself. The plate is simple and unadorned, emphasizing the rustic and hearty presentation of the steak.
description: A thick, bone-in steak sliced and arranged on a plain white plate, featuring a seared crust and pink, juicy interior with visible fat marbling.
description_view_0: The steak slices are fanned out on the plate, with the bone prominently visible at the back and the pink interior of the meat clearly shown.
description_view_1: This view highlights the charred, seared exterior of the steak and the underside of the bone, with less of the pink interior visible.
description_view_2: The bone is more central, with the steak slices radiating outward and the seared crust and pink interior both visible.
description_view_3: The steak slices are arranged facing forward, showing the thick, juicy pink centers and the bone at the rear of the plate.
attribute_grill_marks: Grill marks are faint and irregular, with some parallel lines visible but not strongly pronounced.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with the marbling distributed fairly evenly throughout the steak slices.
